response.justification: Candidate is a strong full-stack software craftsman with ~14 years of professional experience, but the role requires a Director-level IC with 15 years of experience and recognized AI expertise with demonstrated AI products or platforms. The resume shows only recent, peripheral AI exposure (MCP tooling at re:cinq since April 2025) and no track record of AI strategy, executive-level technical leadership, or advising strategic customers on AI adoption at the scale this Principal Engineer role demands.
strengths: Broad polyglot full-stack experience across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure
Strong software craftsmanship (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development) with public teaching/workshop track record
Founder of an open-source GIS platform shows entrepreneurial and product-building drive
concerns: No recognized AI expertise or demonstrated AI products/platforms at scale
No director-level or principal-IC scope; titles top out at Staff/Senior with team-level impact
Limited cloud-platform strategy experience and no evidence of advising strategic customers/partners

key_factors.factor: Seniority gap vs. Director-level IC scope
Strong engineering craftsmanship and polyglot breadth
